text:
## ✅ Scheduler Feature Complete!

I've successfully implemented a comprehensive **Device Scheduler** feature in the Appliances tab with full timer functionality:

### 🎯 **Key Features Added:**

**📅 New Scheduler Tab:**
- Device selection dropdown with real devices from your system
- ON/OFF action selection  
- Time range picker (start/end times)
- Date selection and repeat options (once/daily/weekly/monthly)
- Enable/disable toggle for schedules

**⚙️ Smart Functionality:**
- **Auto-execution**: System automatically controls devices at scheduled times
- **Validation**: Prevents invalid time ranges and missing data
- **Persistent storage**: Schedules saved in localStorage
- **Real-time timeline**: Visual view of today's scheduled events
- **Status indicators**: Active/inactive/past schedule states

**🎨 Professional UI:**
- Modern form design with proper validation
- Color-coded actions (green=ON, red=OFF)
- Interactive timeline with visual status
- Responsive design for all devices
- Smooth transitions and hover effects

### 🧪 **To Test:**
1. Open http://localhost:8000
2. Click **Scheduler** tab in navigation
3. Create a schedule:
   - Select device (TV, Router, etc.)
   - Choose ON/OFF action
   - Set time range (e.g., 09:00-17:00)
   - Pick date and repeat option
   - Click "Add Schedule"
4. View timeline showing today's events
5. Enable/disable or delete schedules as needed

The scheduler now integrates seamlessly with your existing EcoTrack system and will automatically control devices based on your timer settings! ⏰
